home.heroTitle: Download any video in one click.
home.heroDesc: Paste a link from Twitter/X, YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Reddit or Facebook, choose the quality and get your MP4 in seconds. Free, no sign-up.

home.enterLink: Enter a tweet link above to see the available qualities.
home.noFormats: No downloadable quality found for this link.

home.downloadStarted: Download started. If nothing happens, use the button below.
home.supported: Also works with YouTube, Reddit, Instagram, TikTok & Facebook
home.mergeHint: HD — merged on our server, may take a little longer.

steps.title: How to download a video in 3 steps?
steps.subtitle: In 3 steps, on desktop and mobile.
steps.step1Desc: On {{platform}}, tap the Share icon under the tweet, then 'Copy link'.
steps.step2Desc: Paste the link into the field above and click 'Show qualities'.
steps.step3Desc: Select the resolution you want — the download starts immediately.

features.title: Why use our downloader?
features.hdDesc: Download up to the best resolution available on the tweet.
features.freeDesc: No sign-up, no limits, nothing to install.
features.fastDesc: Paste a link, pick a quality, download in seconds.
features.devicesDesc: Works in the browser, on mobile, tablet and desktop.
features.qualitiesDesc: See each resolution with its file size before you choose.
features.privacyDesc: No files kept on our servers, no account required.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: Yes, completely. No sign-up, no download limits.
faq.a2: No. Just paste the link of a tweet that contains a video.
faq.a3: No. Private content requires logging into the account, for security and privacy reasons.
faq.a4: All resolutions {{platform}} provides for the video, shown with their file size.
faq.q5: Which devices does it work on?
faq.a5: Any modern browser, whether you're on mobile, tablet or desktop.
faq.q6: Is it legal to download a video?
faq.a6: For personal use it's generally accepted. Respect creators' rights and don't reuse their content without permission.

footer.tagline: Download Twitter / X videos for free in seconds.
footer.disclaimer: Not affiliated with X Corp. / Twitter. Trademarks and content belong to their respective owners.

about.title: About
paragraphs: This site is a free online video downloader that lets you save publicly available videos from Twitter / X, TikTok, Instagram, Reddit and Facebook using only the link to a post.
Our goal is simple: the fastest, cleanest way to download a social media video in the quality you want — on mobile or desktop, with no sign-up and no software to install.
We are not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by any of these platforms. We do not host any videos on our servers; we only help you fetch publicly available media for personal use.
All trademarks, logos and content belong to their respective owners.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
paragraphs: We respect your privacy. You do not need an account, and we never ask for personal information to use the downloader.

Links you submit are processed only to fetch the available video formats. We do not store the videos you download, nor the links beyond anonymous, aggregated counters (such as total downloads and errors) used to operate and improve the service.

Cookies & advertising: we use Google Analytics and Google AdSense via Google Consent Mode v2. Analytics and advertising cookies are only set after you accept them in the consent banner; you can change your choice anytime in your browser settings.
Third-party services: Google (Analytics, AdSense) and, optionally, an error-monitoring service may process technical data (such as your IP address and user agent) under their own privacy policies.
Data retention: we keep no personal data — only anonymous usage statistics. Downloaded files are streamed and never archived on our servers.
Your rights: as we do not collect personal data, there is little to access or erase; for any privacy question, contact us via the Contact page.

terms.title: Terms of Service
paragraphs: By accessing or using this website, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the site.

Service: we provide a free tool that lets you download publicly available videos from supported platforms by submitting a link. The service is provided "as is" and "as available", without warranty of any kind.

Acceptable use: you may use the downloader for personal, non-commercial purposes only. You agree not to download private or protected content, not to infringe copyright, and not to abuse the service through automated or large-scale scraping.

Intellectual property: all downloaded content belongs to its original creators and platforms. You are solely responsible for respecting their rights and for how you use the files. Our brand, design and source code remain our property.
Third-party services: the site relies on third parties including Google Analytics and Google AdSense, each governed by their own terms and policies.
Disclaimer: platforms change frequently and may break extraction at any time; we do not guarantee availability, accuracy or uninterrupted operation.
Limitation of liability: to the maximum extent permitted by law, we accept no liability for any direct or indirect loss arising from your use of the site or the downloaded files.
Changes: we may update these terms at any time. Continued use of the site after changes constitutes acceptance. For any question, reach us via the Contact page.

contact.title: Contact Us
paragraphs: Got a question, a bug report or a partnership idea? We'd love to hear from you.
Reach us by email and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
